# Channel Icons Reference

Inline SVG icons for ad platforms. Brand-colored, optimized for dark backgrounds. Only ad platforms get icons — organic channels (Organic Search, Direct, Email, etc.) render without an icon.

To use in a table cell:
```html
<td><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">ICON_SVG <span>Channel Name</span></div></td>
```

## Available Icons

```svg
<svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#2D2D6E"><path d="M15.107 3.555c-2.69 0-4.823 2.22-4.823 4.91 0 .834.21 1.62.582 2.308L5.555 20.445h3.76l3.616-6.74a4.821 4.821 0 0 0 2.176.519c2.69 0 4.823-2.22 4.823-4.91s-2.133-4.91-4.823-4.91v.151zm0 7.469c-1.385 0-2.51-1.147-2.51-2.56 0-1.41 1.125-2.558 2.51-2.558s2.51 1.147 2.51 2.559c0 1.412-1.125 2.559-2.51 2.559z"/></svg>
```

## Channel Name → Icon Mapping

Match channel names to icons using these patterns. Channels not matching any pattern get no icon — just the text name.

| Channel contains | Icon to use |
|---|---|
| `Google Ads`, `P Max`, `Shopping - Google`, `Generic Search - Google`, `Display - Google` | Google Ads |
| `Meta`, `Facebook`, `Paid Social - Meta`, `fb /`, `ig /`, `facebook /`, `instagram /` | Meta |
| `Microsoft`, `Bing`, `bing /`, `Generic Search - MS` | Microsoft Ads |
| `TikTok`, `tiktok` | TikTok |
| `LinkedIn`, `linkedin` | LinkedIn |
| `Pinterest`, `pinterest` | Pinterest |
| `Reddit`, `reddit` | Reddit |
| `Twitter`, `X Ads` | X (Twitter) |
| `Snapchat` | Snapchat |
| `Awin`, `AffiliateWindow`, `Affiliate` | Awin |
